case_title: CASHCALL, INC. VS. SOK H MUN et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUN, SOK H $9,886.61 PRINCIPAL, $1,318.21 INTEREST, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,459.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
